meaning: n.蜻募瑞,蜻募瑞迚ｩ,蛯ｬ蜷仙奄vi.蜻募瑞,螟ｧ驥丞鵡蜃ｺvt.蜷仙倂,蜻募瑞
examples: The smell made her want to vomit.
Any product made from cow's milk made him vomit.
Zimmer slipped and nearly fell on a pool of vomit.
It's whale vomit - known as ambergris, which is still sometimes used to make perfume.
His throat ached, and he could taste the vomit still lingering in his mouth.
